ticket.subject: Welcome to Shopify Partner PluginHive! We’re here to help you save both time and money
ticket.raw_subject: Welcome to Shopify Partner PluginHive! We’re here to help you save both time and money
ticket.description:
Hello David,

 Greeting from Shopify Partner PluginHive!

 Thank you for installing our Shopify App - **“PH Multi Carrier Shipping Label App”** on nightanddaybeverages.myshopify.com

 Our team would like to assist you with the complete app onboarding.

 We request you let us know a suitable time for the onboarding session, which will not take more than 10 mins. Feel free to reply to this email (or) share your contact number, we will get in touch with you.

 You can also refer our documentation to set up the app and start shipping - click here to know more

 Looking forward to hearing from you.

 Thanks and Regards,
 Team PluginHive
https://www.pluginhive.com/about/#team

comments.body:
Hello David,

Good day!

This is Sagar from the PH Multi Carrier Shipping Label app. Thank you for installing our solution.

We’d be happy to schedule a **free onboarding call** over Zoom screen-share to assist you with setting up and configuring the app as per your needs.

Please respond to this email so we can arrange a convenient time for the call. (or) You can also book a slot for the call according to your availability using this link - **[****Click Here****]**

Thank you, and we look forward to your response.

Best regards,
Sagar K S
PluginHive

comments.body: Hi am I unable to show what proudcts need to go into the shipment right on the shipping label? Need qty and SKU or description or something. I currently do this with Shipstation but I am looking to switch to you guys. But this is an absolute requirement. I do not want to print packing slips
comments.html_body: Hi am I unable to show what proudcts need to go into the shipment right on the shipping label? Need qty and SKU or description or something. is there a way that i can have the qty and sku or name of the products that must go into the package shown on the shipping label? i do this with shipstation but am looking to switch to you guys

comments.body:
Hello David,

Thank you for your response.

We could see that an attempt was made to generate label for a couple of orders and it failed with the error message "Insufficient funds. Please check your billing settings at https://app.easypost.com/account/settings?tab=billing".

Please add the funds to the EasyPost wallet and try generating label for an order with our app. Once done, check for the details shown on the label generated.

If you still need an assistance, let us know.

Best regards,
Sagar K S
PluginHive
comments.html_body:
Hello David,
 
Thank you for your response. 
 
We could see that an attempt was made to generate label for a couple of orders and it failed with the error message "Insufficient funds. Please check your billing settings at https://app.easypost.com/account/settings?tab=billing".
 
Please add the funds to the EasyPost wallet and try generating label for an order with our app. Once done, check for the details shown on the label generated. 
 
If you still need an assistance, let us know.
 
Best regards,
Sagar K S
PluginHive

comments.body:
Hello David,

Good Day!

To address this query, could you generate a shipping label through our app and verify the details shown on the label?

Currently, i can see there is no label generated through our app.

Once you have generated a label in the app and have verified it, if you are not seeing any product details, let us know.

Best regards,
Sagar K S
PluginHive

comments.body:
I could. But is this a function that your app does? A normal shipping label does not generally display this but some apps allow you to turn this feature on, I do not see an area in the app to turn this on. If it does not then there would be no point in me putting my payment information in and purchasing a label.



Can you please confirm ?
comments.html_body:
I could. But is this a function that your app does? A normal shipping label does not generally display this but some apps allow you to turn this feature on, I do not see an area in the app to turn this on. If it does not then there would be no point in me putting my payment information in and purchasing a label.  

 

Can you please confirm ?
comments.plain_body: I could. But is this a function that your app does? A normal shipping label does not generally display this but some apps allow you to turn this feature on, I do not see an area in the app to turn this on. If it does not then there would be no point in me putting my payment information in and purchasing a label.       Can you please confirm ?
